header.name: Tommaso Prinetti
header.title: product/digital designer & researcher.
header.description: Designer focused on innovation and emerging technologies, working in interdisciplinary teams to bring a human-centered and use-oriented perspective to complex projects. I design both products and the infrastructure around them. My effort is oriented towards enabling people to actually do, explore and act through carefully designed tools.

mainExperiences.title: médialab Sciences Po (2024-2026)
mainExperiences.description: Design of the research infrastructure to enable participatory research projects and their communication through a mixture of design tools.

mainExperiences.title: Density Design Lab (2024)
mainExperiences.description: Research design & digital method design for EMIF-IFLA project about inner stereotypes of generative AI models (images) w/ Tactical Tech.

mainExperiences.title: Freelance designer (2020-2024)
mainExperiences.description: Brand identity strategy (design-side), video direction and execution, web-design & development, anything creative I managed to get my hands on.
